zh.lifeSummary: 當Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I於大約1252年出生在德國貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格時，他的父親Marquard Langenmantel43歲，母親Elisabeth N28歲。他與Elisabeth Launginger結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1295年在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 奧斯包格享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I于大约1252年出生在德国貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格时，他的父亲Marquard Langenmantel43岁，母亲Elisabeth N28岁。他与Elisabeth Launginger结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1295年在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 奧斯包格享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sparren
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Perrin
meanings: French and English: from the Old French and Middle English personal name Perrin, a pet form of Old French Perre, a variant of Pierre , French form of Peter . Compare Perine , Perrine , and Prine .

History: Henri Perrin from Louargat in Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany (France), married Jeanne Merrin in Montreal, QC, in 1661. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variants or altered forms Perrine and Pareyn) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America. One of the Huguenot ancestors was Daniel Perrin (1642–1719), nicknamed The Huguenot, who arrived in New York in 1665, aboard the Philip, and settled first in NJ and later on Staten Island. Among his descendants the surname is common in the altered forms Perrine, Perine and Prine. The Staten Island community of Huguenot is named after Daniel Perrin and other Huguenots who settled in the area during the late 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Hartmann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hard ‘strong, hardy’ + man ‘man’. The Blessed Hartmann ( d. 1164 ) enjoyed a cult in Austria. Hartmann von Aue ( c.1170– c.1220 ) was an influential writer of chivalric romances.

en.lifeSummary: When Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I was born about 1252, in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Marquard Langenmantel, was 43 and his mother, Elisabeth N, was 28. He married Elisabeth Launginger. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1295, in Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I est né environ 1252, à Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Marquard Langenmantel, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth N, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth Launginger. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1295, à Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I um 1252 in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Marquard Langenmantel 43 und seine Mutter Elisabeth N 28. Er hat Elisabeth Launginger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1295 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I è nato il circa 1252 nel Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Marquard Langenmantel, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth N, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth Launginger. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1295, nel Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren Iが約1252年にドイツバイエルンアウグスブルグアウグスブルグで生まれた時，父Marquard Langenmantelは43歳，母Elisabeth Nは28歳であった。Elisabeth Laungingerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1295年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アウグスブルグで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I(이)가 대략 1252년 독일 베이른 오그스버그 오그스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Marquard Langenmantel(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth N(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Elisabeth Launginger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1295년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 오그스버그에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I nasceu aproximadamente 1252, em Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Marquard Langenmantel, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth N, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Launginger. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1295, em Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Alemanha, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I родился около 1252 г. в местности аугсбург, аугсбург, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Marquard Langenmantel было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth N, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Launginger. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1295 г. в местности ландкрис аугсбург, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reichsritter Hartmann Langenmantel von Sparren I nació aproximadamente 1252, en Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Marquard Langenmantel, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Elisabeth N, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Elisabeth Launginger. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1295, en Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 44 años.
